title: Pikku prinsessa
summaries: "Pikku prinsessa" by Frances Hodgson Burnett is a children's novel first published in 1905. When wealthy Sara Crewe's fortunes collapse after her father's death, the once-pampered boarding school student becomes a penniless servant, forced to live in a cold attic and work for the cruel headmistress who once fawned over her. Through poverty and hardship, Sara maintains her kindness and dignity, believing that true nobility comes from character, not wealth. A mysterious benefactor begins transforming her bleak existence, leading to an unexpected connection that will change everything. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
